name: Kiri Industries Limited
summary: Kiri Industries Limited manufactures and sells dyes, dye intermediates, and basic chemicals in India. The company offers reactive, acid, and direct dyes; and basic chemicals, including chloro sulphonic acid, sulphuric acid, oleum, and spent sulphuric acid. It also provides dye intermediates, such as sulpho J.acid, sulpho tobias acid, sulpho gama acid, and para nitro toluene ortho sulfonic acid. The company's products are used in various industrial sectors comprising apparel, hosiery, automotive, carpets, leather, home upholstery, industrial fabrics, etc. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Kiri Dyes and Chemicals Limited and changed its name to Kiri Industries Limited in March 2011. Kiri Industries Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
